meaning: n.雾,烟雾,尘雾,迷惑,苔藓vi.被雾笼罩,变模糊vt.使困惑,以雾笼罩
examples: The plane crashed in thick fog.
The crash happened in thick fog.
When fog forms below 0C, its super-cooled water droplets remain liquid, even though the temperature is below freezing.
Whether fighting a military rival or trying to beat the market, we must accept the fog.
